form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 450m at this track behind Stereophonic beaten 8 lengths (25.55). Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 450m at this track behind Stereophonic beaten 8 lengths (25.55). Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels entering the first turn and ran wide.

form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished seventh on April 4 over 515m at The Gardens behind Drink To That, beaten 10 lengths (30.50) in a Grade 5. Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished seventh on April 4 over 515m at The Gardens behind Drink To That, beaten 10 lengths (30.50) in a Grade 5. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 515m at Gosford in a handy 29.56 beating Kaelix Nitro. In sparkling form and can win again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 515m at Gosford in a handy 29.56 beating Kaelix Nitro. In sparkling form and can win again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (29.76) over 520m at Wentworth Park. Boxed awkwardly and looks safely held.

form.formComment: Finished second (25.03) at this track last time making it three placings in a row. Jumps from the outside. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.comment: Finished second (25.03) at this track last time making it three placings in a row. Jumps from the outside. Solid top-three prospects.

form.formComment: Recorded a neck win (22.84) in a Grade 5 last time at this track. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Looks a place chance at best.
